meaning: n.伊顿(在伦敦附近的白金汉郡.泰晤士河边的一个市镇,伊顿公学所在地)
examples: Tony Little, the headmaster of Eton, warned that boys were being failed by the British education system because it had become too focused on girls.
Eton College should have noted the bonding effect not only of the chapel, but also of songs like "Jolly Boating Weather".
Not everyone can rely on a good local school, let alone an Eton.
This photograph shows the summer 1949 report card of fifteen-year-old Eton College student John Gurdon.
Davis Stakes on Feb. 2, and Eton Blue, trained by Hall of Famer Nick Zito.
